info.title: Agentic Services Protocol — MCP Transport
info.description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) transport binding for ASP. Defines JSON-RPC methods that MCP servers expose as tools to LLMs. Each method maps 1:1 to a REST endpoint in openapi.yaml, using the same request/response schemas.

methods.name: provider_search
methods.summary: Search for providers by location, category, rating, and availability.
methods.description: Equivalent to POST /discovery/search. Returns a paginated list of providers matching the given filters.

params.name: filters
params.description: Search filters including location, category, rating, service time, and price level.

methods.name: get_provider_catalog
methods.summary: Get a provider's complete catalog with sections, items, and modifiers.
methods.description: Equivalent to GET /catalog/{provider_id}/catalog. Returns the full catalog structure including modifier groups.

params.name: provider_id
params.description: Identifier of the provider whose catalog to retrieve.

methods.name: reorder_catalog_items
methods.summary: Reorder from a previous order and return currently available items.
methods.description: Equivalent to POST /catalog/reorder. Returns available items and a list of unavailable items from the original order.

params.name: order_id
params.description: The previous order to reorder from.

params.name: provider_id
params.description: The provider the original order belongs to.

params.name: scheduled_for
params.description: Optional ISO 8601 datetime for scheduled reorder fulfillment.

result.name: reorder_result
result.description: Available and unavailable items from the prior order.

methods.name: create_checkout
methods.summary: Create a checkout with line items, fulfillment, and loyalty discount.
methods.description: Equivalent to POST /checkouts. Creates a new checkout extending UCP checkout with fulfillment, per-item customization, and loyalty-tier discounts.

params.name: line_items
params.description: Cart items with optional special instructions and modifier selections.

params.name: fulfillment
params.description: Fulfillment details including address and instructions.

params.name: loyalty
params.description: Loyalty tier discount to apply.

result.name: checkout
result.description: The created checkout with computed totals.

methods.name: update_checkout
methods.description: Equivalent to PATCH /checkouts/{checkout_id}. Update fulfillment address, instructions, line items, or other checkout fields.

params.name: checkout_id
params.description: Identifier of the checkout to update.

params.name: updates
params.description: Fields to update on the checkout.

methods.name: complete_checkout
methods.summary: Finalize a checkout and process payment.
methods.description: Equivalent to POST /checkouts/{checkout_id}/complete. Completes the checkout, processes payment, and creates an order.

params.name: checkout_id
params.description: Identifier of the checkout to complete.

params.name: payment_method
params.description: Payment method identifier.

result.name: checkout
result.description: The completed checkout with order confirmation.

methods.name: get_order_tracking
methods.summary: Get the current fulfillment status and ETA for an order.
methods.description: Equivalent to GET /orders/{order_id}/tracking. Returns the latest fulfillment status including estimated time and optional agent location.

params.name: order_id
params.description: Identifier of the order to track.

methods.name: submit_review
methods.summary: Submit a post-service review for a completed order.
methods.description: Equivalent to POST /reviews. Creates a review with rating, optional comment, and optional category scores.

params.name: order_id
params.description: The order being reviewed.

params.name: provider_id
params.description: The provider being reviewed.

params.name: rating
params.description: Overall rating out of 5.

params.name: comment
params.description: Optional free-text review.

params.name: scores
params.description: Optional category scores.

methods.name: get_provider_reviews
methods.summary: Retrieve paginated reviews for a provider.
methods.description: Equivalent to GET /reviews/{provider_id}. Returns reviews, average rating, and pagination metadata.

params.name: provider_id
params.description: The provider whose reviews to retrieve.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number.

params.name: page_size
params.description: Number of reviews per page.

methods.name: get_user_profile
methods.description: Equivalent to GET /personalization/profile. Returns preferences, loyalty status, order history, and default address.

methods.name: get_promotions
methods.summary: Get personalized promotions for the user.
methods.description: Equivalent to GET /personalization/promotions. Returns promotions personalized to the user, optionally scoped to a provider.

params.name: provider_id
params.description: Scope promotions to a specific provider.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of promotions to return.

order_status_updated.name: order_status_updated
order_status_updated.summary: Notification sent when an order's fulfillment status changes.
order_status_updated.description: Push-model counterpart to get_order_tracking. The MCP server emits this as a resource update notification (resources/updated) on the order resource URI. Clients subscribe to order://{order_id}/status to receive these.

params.name: event
params.description: The status update event payload.

tracking_stream_event.name: tracking_stream_event
tracking_stream_event.summary: Continuous tracking event from the live stream (location, status, heartbeat).
tracking_stream_event.description: Emitted as a resource update on order://{order_id}/tracking/stream. The MCP server bridges the WebSocket channel and forwards tracking_stream_event frames as resource notifications. Location updates arrive every 3-5 seconds during en_route.

params.name: event
params.description: The tracking stream event payload.

x-mcp-resources.description: MCP resource URIs exposed by this server. Clients can subscribe to these for real-time updates.

resources.name: Order Fulfillment Status
resources.description: Live fulfillment status for an order. Subscribe to receive status_update_event notifications as the order progresses through accepted → in_progress → en_route → completed.

resources.name: Provider Catalog
resources.description: A provider's current catalog. May change due to item availability.

resources.name: Order Live Tracking Stream
resources.description: Real-time location and status stream for an active order. The MCP server internally connects to the WebSocket channel (defined in asyncapi.yaml) and surfaces continuous tracking_stream_event updates as frequent resource update notifications. Provides agent GPS coordinates every 3-5 seconds during the en_route phase.
